name: Quiet Viewing Room
description:
You have entered a smaller room.  There are a few wooden chairs around by the
walls.  On the west wall to the far north side, you see a large framed opening.
It is covered with thin pieces of material so you cannot see into that room,
but you can hear ever There is a doorway on the west wall, to the far south
side leading to the main room from which you entered here.  If you wish to talk
to others you must go to the other viewing room.
